items.title: Sudan war crimes saw 6,000 killed in three days, UN says
items.dek: Paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) committed the atrocities in the city of el-Fasher, says a UN report.
items.body: Paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) committed the atrocities in the city of el-Fasher, says a UN report.
